overview.description: The Invesco Short Duration Total Return Bond ETF (GTOS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund that holds various fixed income securities of any rating while maintaining a portfolio maturity and duration between one and three years. GTOS was launched on Dec 9, 2022 and is issued by Invesco.
